---
title: "Papers"
pagetitle: "Papers — Glenn Moncrieff"
---

```{=html}
<header class="page-head wrap">
  <span class="mono">// Publications</span>
  <h1>Papers</h1>
  <p>Peer-reviewed work on vegetation monitoring, remote sensing, biome dynamics, fire ecology, and machine learning for biodiversity. The full list is also on <a href="https://scholar.google.co.za/citations?user=_FFdaCUAAAAJ" target="_blank" rel="noopener" style="color:var(--accent); border-bottom:1px solid var(--accent-line);">Google Scholar</a>.</p>
</header>

<section class="section--tight wrap">
  <div class="sec-head">
    <h2>2026</h2>
    <span class="mono">01 paper</span>
  </div>
  <div class="rows">
    <div class="row">
      <span class="row__date">2026</span>
      <div class="row__main">
        <h3>Advancing Mediterranean biodiversity monitoring in South Africa through machine learning and cost-effective UAS imagery</h3>
        <p class="paper__venue">JGR Biogeosciences (in press)</p>
        <p class="paper__authors">M. Das Chaity, R. Chancia, R. Bhatta, J. A. Slingsby, <em>G. R. Moncrieff</em>, J. van Aardt</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="section--tight wrap">
  <div class="sec-head">
    <h2>2025</h2>
    <span class="mono">04 papers</span>
  </div>
  <div class="rows">
    <div class="row">
      <span class="row__date">2025</span>
      <div class="row__main">
        <h3>Global extent and change in human modification of terrestrial ecosystems from 1990 to 2022</h3>
        <p class="paper__venue">Scientific Data</p>
        <p class="paper__authors">D. M. Theobald, J. R. Oakleaf, <em>G. Moncrieff</em>, M. Voigt, J. Kiesecker, C. M. Kennedy</p>
        <div class="paper__links">
          <a href="https://doi.org/10.1038/s41597-025-04892-2" target="_blank" rel="noopener">DOI</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="row">
      <span class="row__date">2025</span>
      <div class="row__main">
        <h3>The Biodiversity Survey of the Cape (BioSCape), integrating remote sensing with biodiversity science</h3>
        <p class="paper__venue">npj Biodiversity</p>
        <p class="paper__authors">A. W. Cardoso, E. L. Hestir, J. A. Slingsby, C. J. Forbes, <em>G. R. Moncrieff</em>, W. Turner, A. M. Wilson, et al.</p>
        <div class="paper__links">
          <a href="https://doi.org/10.1038/s44185-024-00071-5" target="_blank" rel="noopener">DOI</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="row">
      <span class="row__date">2025</span>
      <div class="row__main">
        <h3>The global spectrum of tree crown architecture</h3>
        <p class="paper__venue">Nature Communications</p>
        <p class="paper__authors">T. Jucker, F. J. Fischer, J. Chave, D. A. Coomes, <em>G. R. Moncrieff</em>, et al.</p>
        <div class="paper__links">
          <a href="https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-025-60262-x" target="_blank" rel="noopener">DOI</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="row">
      <span class="row__date">2025</span>
      <div class="row__main">
        <h3>Domain adaptive temporal convolutional neural networks for continuous change detection in the Albany Thicket biome</h3>
        <p class="paper__venue">IGARSS 2025, IEEE International Geoscience and Remote Sensing Symposium</p>
        <p class="paper__authors">C. Mahlasi, <em>G. R. Moncrieff</em>, V. Visser, J. Slingsby</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="section--tight wrap">
  <div class="sec-head">
    <h2>2024</h2>
    <span class="mono">01 paper</span>
  </div>
  <div class="rows">
    <div class="row">
      <span class="row__date">2024</span>
      <div class="row__main">
        <h3>Uncertainty quantification for probabilistic machine learning in earth observation using conformal prediction</h3>
        <p class="paper__venue">Scientific Reports</p>
        <p class="paper__authors">G. Singh, <em>G. Moncrieff</em>, Z. Venter, K. Cawse-Nicholson, J. Slingsby, T. B. Robinson</p>
        <div class="paper__links">
          <a href="https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-024-65954-w" target="_blank" rel="noopener">DOI</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="section--tight wrap">
  <div class="sec-head">
    <h2>2023</h2>
    <span class="mono">01 paper</span>
  </div>
  <div class="rows">
    <div class="row">
      <span class="row__date">2023</span>
      <div class="row__main">
        <h3>Regional ecological forecasting across scales: a manifesto for a biodiversity hotspot</h3>
        <p class="paper__venue">Methods in Ecology and Evolution</p>
        <p class="paper__authors">J. A. Slingsby, A. M. Wilson, B. Maitner, <em>G. R. Moncrieff</em></p>
        <div class="paper__links">
          <a href="https://doi.org/10.1111/2041-210X.14046" target="_blank" rel="noopener">DOI</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="section--tight wrap">
  <div class="sec-head">
    <h2>2022</h2>
    <span class="mono">05 papers</span>
  </div>
  <div class="rows">
    <div class="row">
      <span class="row__date">2022</span>
      <div class="row__main">
        <h3>Continuous land cover change detection in a critically endangered shrubland ecosystem using neural networks</h3>
        <p class="paper__venue">Remote Sensing</p>
        <p class="paper__authors"><em>G. R. Moncrieff</em></p>
        <div class="paper__links">
          <a href="https://doi.org/10.3390/rs14122766" target="_blank" rel="noopener">DOI</a>
          <a href="https://github.com/GMoncrieff/renosterveld-monitor" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Code</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="row">
      <span class="row__date">2022</span>
      <div class="row__main">
        <h3>Forecasting vegetation dynamics in an open ecosystem by integrating deep learning and environmental variables</h3>
        <p class="paper__venue">International Journal of Applied Earth Observation and Geoinformation</p>
        <p class="paper__authors">Y. Ma, Y. Hu, <em>G. R. Moncrieff</em>, J. A. Slingsby, A. M. Wilson, B. Maitner, R. Z. Zhou</p>
        <div class="paper__links">
          <a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jag.2022.103060" target="_blank" rel="noopener">DOI</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="row">
      <span class="row__date">2022</span>
      <div class="row__main">
        <h3>Tallo: a global tree allometry and crown architecture database</h3>
        <p class="paper__venue">Global Change Biology</p>
        <p class="paper__authors">T. Jucker, F. J. Fischer, J. Chave, D. A. Coomes, <em>G. R. Moncrieff</em>, et al.</p>
        <div class="paper__links">
          <a href="https://doi.org/10.1111/gcb.16302" target="_blank" rel="noopener">DOI</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="row">
      <span class="row__date">2022</span>
      <div class="row__main">
        <h3>Drowning in data, thirsty for information and starved for understanding: a biodiversity information hub for cooperative environmental monitoring in South Africa</h3>
        <p class="paper__venue">Biological Conservation</p>
        <p class="paper__authors">S. MacFadyen, N. Allsopp, R. Altwegg, S. Archibald, <em>G. R. Moncrieff</em>, et al.</p>
        <div class="paper__links">
          <a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.biocon.2022.109736" target="_blank" rel="noopener">DOI</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="row">
      <span class="row__date">2022</span>
      <div class="row__main">
        <h3>Africa, in Climate Change 2022: Impacts, Adaptation and Vulnerability (IPCC AR6, Working Group II)</h3>
        <p class="paper__venue">Cambridge University Press</p>
        <p class="paper__authors">C. H. Trisos, I. O. Adelekan, E. Totin, A. Ayanlade, <em>G. R. Moncrieff</em>, et al.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="section--tight wrap">
  <div class="sec-head">
    <h2>2021</h2>
    <span class="mono">03 papers</span>
  </div>
  <div class="rows">
    <div class="row">
      <span class="row__date">2021</span>
      <div class="row__main">
        <h3>Locating and dating land cover change events in the Renosterveld, a critically endangered shrubland ecosystem</h3>
        <p class="paper__venue">Remote Sensing</p>
        <p class="paper__authors"><em>G. R. Moncrieff</em></p>
        <div class="paper__links">
          <a href="https://doi.org/10.3390/rs13050834" target="_blank" rel="noopener">DOI</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="row">
      <span class="row__date">2021</span>
      <div class="row__main">
        <h3>Propagating uncertainty from catchment experiments to estimates of streamflow reduction by invasive alien plants in southwestern South Africa</h3>
        <p class="paper__venue">Hydrological Processes</p>
        <p class="paper__authors"><em>G. R. Moncrieff</em>, J. A. Slingsby, D. C. Le Maitre</p>
        <div class="paper__links">
          <a href="https://doi.org/10.1002/hyp.14161" target="_blank" rel="noopener">DOI</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="row">
      <span class="row__date">2021</span>
      <div class="row__main">
        <h3>Pantropical variability in tree crown allometry</h3>
        <p class="paper__venue">Global Ecology and Biogeography</p>
        <p class="paper__authors">G. J. Loubota Panzou, A. Fayolle, T. Jucker, O. L. Phillips, <em>G. R. Moncrieff</em>, et al.</p>
        <div class="paper__links">
          <a href="https://doi.org/10.1111/geb.13231" target="_blank" rel="noopener">DOI</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="section--tight wrap">
  <div class="sec-head">
    <h2>2020</h2>
    <span class="mono">03 papers</span>
  </div>
  <div class="rows">
    <div class="row">
      <span class="row__date">2020</span>
      <div class="row__main">
        <h3>Near-real time forecasting and change detection for an open ecosystem with complex natural dynamics</h3>
        <p class="paper__venue">ISPRS Journal of Photogrammetry and Remote Sensing</p>
        <p class="paper__authors">J. A. Slingsby, <em>G. R. Moncrieff</em>, A. M. Wilson</p>
        <div class="paper__links">
          <a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.isprsjprs.2020.05.017" target="_blank" rel="noopener">DOI</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="row">
      <span class="row__date">2020</span>
      <div class="row__main">
        <h3>African biomes are most sensitive to changes in CO2 under recent and near-future CO2 conditions</h3>
        <p class="paper__venue">Biogeosciences</p>
        <p class="paper__authors">S. Scheiter, <em>G. R. Moncrieff</em>, M. Pfeiffer, S. I. Higgins</p>
        <div class="paper__links">
          <a href="https://doi.org/10.5194/bg-17-1147-2020" target="_blank" rel="noopener">DOI</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="row">
      <span class="row__date">2020</span>
      <div class="row__main">
        <h3>Altered ignition catchments threaten a hyperdiverse fire-dependent ecosystem</h3>
        <p class="paper__venue">Global Change Biology</p>
        <p class="paper__authors">J. A. Slingsby, <em>G. R. Moncrieff</em>, A. J. Rogers, E. C. February</p>
        <div class="paper__links">
          <a href="https://doi.org/10.1111/gcb.14861" target="_blank" rel="noopener">DOI</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="section--tight wrap">
  <div class="sec-head">
    <h2>2018 &amp; earlier</h2>
    <span class="mono">16 papers</span>
  </div>
  <div class="rows">
    <div class="row">
      <span class="row__date">2018</span>
      <div class="row__main">
        <h3>Biological and geophysical feedbacks with fire in the Earth System</h3>
        <p class="paper__venue">Environmental Research Letters</p>
        <p class="paper__authors">S. Archibald, C. E. R. Lehmann, C. Belcher, W. J. Bond, <em>G. R. Moncrieff</em>, et al.</p>
        <div class="paper__links">
          <a href="https://doi.org/10.1088/1748-9326/aa9ead" target="_blank" rel="noopener">DOI</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="row">
      <span class="row__date">2017</span>
      <div class="row__main">
        <h3>Allometric equations for integrating remote sensing imagery into forest monitoring programmes</h3>
        <p class="paper__venue">Global Change Biology</p>
        <p class="paper__authors">T. Jucker, J. Caspersen, J. Chave, C. Antin, N. Barbier, F. Bongers, <em>G. R. Moncrieff</em>, et al.</p>
        <div class="paper__links">
          <a href="https://doi.org/10.1111/gcb.13388" target="_blank" rel="noopener">DOI</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="row">
      <span class="row__date">2016</span>
      <div class="row__main">
        <h3>The future distribution of the savannah biome: model-based and biogeographic contingency</h3>
        <p class="paper__venue">Philosophical Transactions of the Royal Society B</p>
        <p class="paper__authors"><em>G. R. Moncrieff</em>, S. Scheiter, L. Langan, A. Trabucco, S. I. Higgins</p>
        <div class="paper__links">
          <a href="https://doi.org/10.1098/rstb.2015.0311" target="_blank" rel="noopener">DOI</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="row">
      <span class="row__date">2016</span>
      <div class="row__main">
        <h3>Revising the biome concept for understanding and predicting global change impacts</h3>
        <p class="paper__venue">Journal of Biogeography</p>
        <p class="paper__authors"><em>G. R. Moncrieff</em>, W. J. Bond, S. I. Higgins</p>
        <div class="paper__links">
          <a href="https://doi.org/10.1111/jbi.12701" target="_blank" rel="noopener">DOI</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="row">
      <span class="row__date">2016</span>
      <div class="row__main">
        <h3>Defining functional biomes and monitoring their change globally</h3>
        <p class="paper__venue">Global Change Biology</p>
        <p class="paper__authors">S. I. Higgins, <em>G. R. Moncrieff</em>, R. Buitenwerf</p>
        <div class="paper__links">
          <a href="https://doi.org/10.1111/gcb.13367" target="_blank" rel="noopener">DOI</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="row">
      <span class="row__date">2016</span>
      <div class="row__main">
        <h3>Maintenance of species integrity in the context of a recent radiation: the case of Jamesbrittenia in southern Africa</h3>
        <p class="paper__venue">Botanical Journal of the Linnean Society</p>
        <p class="paper__authors">G. A. Verboom, M. L. Herron, <em>G. R. Moncrieff</em>, J. A. Slingsby</p>
        <div class="paper__links">
          <a href="https://doi.org/10.1111/boj.12447" target="_blank" rel="noopener">DOI</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="row">
      <span class="row__date">2015</span>
      <div class="row__main">
        <h3>An operational framework for biome boundary research with examples from South Africa</h3>
        <p class="paper__venue">South African Journal of Botany</p>
        <p class="paper__authors">A. J. Potts, <em>G. R. Moncrieff</em>, W. J. Bond, R. M. Cowling</p>
        <div class="paper__links">
          <a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.sajb.2015.07.002" target="_blank" rel="noopener">DOI</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="row">
      <span class="row__date">2015</span>
      <div class="row__main">
        <h3>Understanding global change impacts on South African biomes using Dynamic Vegetation Models</h3>
        <p class="paper__venue">South African Journal of Botany</p>
        <p class="paper__authors"><em>G. R. Moncrieff</em>, S. Scheiter, J. A. Slingsby, S. I. Higgins</p>
        <div class="paper__links">
          <a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.sajb.2015.02.004" target="_blank" rel="noopener">DOI</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="row">
      <span class="row__date">2015</span>
      <div class="row__main">
        <h3>Intercontinental divergence in the climate envelope of major plant biomes</h3>
        <p class="paper__venue">Global Ecology and Biogeography</p>
        <p class="paper__authors"><em>G. R. Moncrieff</em>, T. Hickler, S. I. Higgins</p>
        <div class="paper__links">
          <a href="https://doi.org/10.1111/geb.12257" target="_blank" rel="noopener">DOI</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="row">
      <span class="row__date">2015</span>
      <div class="row__main">
        <h3>Paleoscape model of coastal South Africa during modern human origins: progress in scaling and coupling climate, vegetation, and agent-based models on XSEDE</h3>
        <p class="paper__venue">Proceedings of the 2015 XSEDE Conference</p>
        <p class="paper__authors">E. Shook, C. Wren, C. W. Marean, A. J. Potts, J. Franklin, S. Scheiter, <em>G. R. Moncrieff</em>, et al.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="row">
      <span class="row__date">2014</span>
      <div class="row__main">
        <h3>Contrasting architecture of key African and Australian savanna tree taxa drives intercontinental structural divergence</h3>
        <p class="paper__venue">Global Ecology and Biogeography</p>
        <p class="paper__authors"><em>G. R. Moncrieff</em>, C. E. R. Lehmann, J. Schnitzler, J. Gambiza, S. I. Higgins, et al.</p>
        <div class="paper__links">
          <a href="https://doi.org/10.1111/geb.12205" target="_blank" rel="noopener">DOI</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="row">
      <span class="row__date">2014</span>
      <div class="row__main">
        <h3>Increasing atmospheric CO2 overrides the historical legacy of multiple stable biome states in Africa</h3>
        <p class="paper__venue">New Phytologist</p>
        <p class="paper__authors"><em>G. R. Moncrieff</em>, S. Scheiter, W. J. Bond, S. I. Higgins</p>
        <div class="paper__links">
          <a href="https://doi.org/10.1111/nph.12551" target="_blank" rel="noopener">DOI</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="row">
      <span class="row__date">2014</span>
      <div class="row__main">
        <h3>Modelling direct and indirect impacts of browser consumption on woody plant growth: moving beyond biomass</h3>
        <p class="paper__venue">Oikos</p>
        <p class="paper__authors"><em>G. R. Moncrieff</em>, S. Chamaillé-Jammes, W. J. Bond</p>
        <div class="paper__links">
          <a href="https://doi.org/10.1111/j.1600-0706.2013.00904.x" target="_blank" rel="noopener">DOI</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="row">
      <span class="row__date">2012</span>
      <div class="row__main">
        <h3>Which traits determine shifts in the abundance of tree species in a fire-prone savanna?</h3>
        <p class="paper__venue">Journal of Ecology</p>
        <p class="paper__authors">S. I. Higgins, W. J. Bond, H. Combrink, J. M. Craine, <em>G. R. Moncrieff</em>, W. S. W. Trollope, et al.</p>
        <div class="paper__links">
          <a href="https://doi.org/10.1111/j.1365-2745.2012.02026.x" target="_blank" rel="noopener">DOI</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="row">
      <span class="row__date">2011</span>
      <div class="row__main">
        <h3>Tree allometries reflect a lifetime of herbivory in an African savanna</h3>
        <p class="paper__venue">Ecology</p>
        <p class="paper__authors"><em>G. R. Moncrieff</em>, S. Chamaillé-Jammes, S. I. Higgins, R. B. O'Hara, W. J. Bond</p>
        <div class="paper__links">
          <a href="https://doi.org/10.1890/11-0230.1" target="_blank" rel="noopener">DOI</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="row">
      <span class="row__date">2008</span>
      <div class="row__main">
        <h3>Stem mortality of Acacia nigrescens induced by the synergistic effects of elephants and fire in Kruger National Park, South Africa</h3>
        <p class="paper__venue">Journal of Tropical Ecology</p>
        <p class="paper__authors"><em>G. R. Moncrieff</em>, L. M. Kruger, J. J. Midgley</p>
        <div class="paper__links">
          <a href="https://doi.org/10.1017/S0266467408005476" target="_blank" rel="noopener">DOI</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```
